chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 42 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.1 & 25. 2. For orders on CMA No.348/2024. 3. For orders on CMA No.349/2024. 4. For hearing of main case. 03.02.2026 Mr. Nadir Hussain Tunio, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel, under instructions, does not press the reference application which is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
